Combat sport events in 2022
ONE 156: Eersel vs. Sadiković
The poster for ONE 156: Eersel vs. Sadiković
PromotionONE Championship
DateApril 22, 2022 (2022-04-22)
VenueSingapore Indoor Stadium
CityKallang, Singapore
Event chronology
ONE X: 10 Years Anniversary ONE 156: Eersel vs. Sadiković ONE 157: Petchmorakot vs. Vienot

ONE 156: Eersel vs. Sadiković was a Combat sport event produced by ONE Championship that took place on April 22, 2022, at the Singapore Indoor Stadium in Kallang, Singapore.[1][2]

Background

[edit]

The event was headlined by a ONE Lightweight Kickboxing World Championship bout between the reigning champion Regian Eersel and title challenger Arian Sadiković.[3]

The co-main event took place for the inaugural ONE Women's Strawweight Muay Thai World Championship bout between Jackie Buntan and Smilla Sundell.[4]

A strawweight MMA clash between #1-ranked Bokang Masunyane and #2-ranked Jarred Brooks took place at the event.[5]

Former WBC and WMC Muay Thai World Champion Liam Harrison faced "Elbow Zombie" Muangthai PK.Saenchai in a bantamweight muay thai showdown and the strawweight mixed martial arts bout between Namiki Kawahara and Danial Williams took place at the event.[6]

Marcus Almeida returns to action against Oumar Kane.[7] However, Kane withdrew due to Injury.

A Strawweight bout between former ONE Strawweight Champion Yosuke Saruta and Gustavo Balart was expected to take place at ONE: Bad Blood in February, but Saruta withdraw from the bout due to tested positive for COVID-19.[8] The pairing was rebooked for this event.

A kickboxing light heavyweight bout between former SUPERKOMBAT Super Cruiserweight Champion Andrei Stoica and Giannis Stoforidis was scheduled for the event.[9]

A Women's Atomweight Muay Thai bout between Former Glory Women's Super Bantamweight Championship Anissa Meksen and Estonian phenom Marie Ruumet was scheduled for the event.[10]

A Women's Strawweight bout between former Women's Strawweight title Challenger Ayaka Miura and Dayane Cardoso was scheduled for the event.[11]

Mikey Musumeci is to compete against Japanese MMA veteran Masakazu Imanari this particular bout will be a Submission Grappling match.[12]

Results

[edit]
Main Card (YouTube / Watch ONE)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight Kickboxing Regian Eersel (c) def. Arian Sadiković Decision (unanimous) 5 3:00 [a]
Women's Strawweight Muay Thai Smilla Sundell def. Jackie Buntan Decision (unanimous) 5 3:00 [b]
Catchweight (128 lbs) Jarred Brooks def. Bokang Masunyane Technical Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:39 [c]
Bantamweight Muay Thai Liam Harrison def. Muangthai P.K.Saenchai TKO (three knockdowns) 1 2:19
Bantamweight Song Min-jong def. Chen Rui Technical Submission (rear-naked choke) 2 4:26
Strawweight Danial Williams def. Namiki Kawahara Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Lead Card (YouTube / Watch ONE)
Strawweight Gustavo Balart def. Yosuke Saruta Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Light Heavyweight Kickboxing Andrei Stoica def. Giannis Stoforidis Decision (majority) 3 3:00 [d]
Women's Atomweight Muay Thai Anissa Meksen def. Marie Ruumet Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Flyweight Windson Ramos def. Woo Sung-hoon Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Women's Strawweight Dayane Souza def. Ayaka Miura TKO (shoulder injury) 2 0:56
Lightweight Abraao Amorim def. Dae Sung-park TKO (knee and punches) 2 1:20
Welterweight Jin Tae-ho def. Agilan Thani Submission (kimura) 1 2:26
Catchweight (142 lbs) Mikey Musumeci def. Masakazu Imanari Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:09 [e]
Featherweight Keanu Subba def. James Yang Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
  1. ^ For the ONE Lightweight Kickboxing World Championship
  2. ^ For the inaugural ONE Women's Strawweight Muay Thai World Championship
  3. ^ ONE Strawweight title eliminator. Masunyane missed weight (128 lbs).
  4. ^ Originally announced as a split decision, due to a miscalculation in scores.
  5. ^ Submission Grappling bout. Awarded 'Performance of the Night'.[13]

[14]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:[15]

  • $50,000 Performance of the Night: Mikey Musumeci, Smilla Sundell and Regian Eersel
  • $100,000 Performance of the Night: Liam Harrison
